---
title: "Final scRNA-seq Annotation Audit"
subtitle: "Static finalized report"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{python}
from __future__ import annotations

import json
from html import escape
from pathlib import Path

import pandas as pd
from IPython.display import HTML, display

try:
    import anndata as ad
except Exception:
    ad = None

try:
    import plotly.express as px
except Exception:
    px = None


RESULTS_DIR = Path(".")
TABLES_DIR = RESULTS_DIR / "tables"


def read_json(path: Path) -> dict:
    if not path.exists():
        return {}
    return json.loads(path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))


def read_table(name: str) -> pd.DataFrame:
    path = TABLES_DIR / name
    if not path.exists():
        return pd.DataFrame()
    return pd.read_csv(path)


def html_table(df: pd.DataFrame, *, columns: list[str] | None = None, limit: int | None = None) -> HTML:
    if df.empty:
        return HTML("<p class='muted'>No rows available.</p>")
    view = df.copy()
    if columns:
        view = view[[column for column in columns if column in view.columns]]
    if limit is not None:
        view = view.head(limit)
    return HTML(view.to_html(index=False, classes="audit-table", escape=True))


def pill(value: object, tone: str = "neutral") -> str:
    return f"<span class='pill {tone}'>{escape(str(value))}</span>"


payload = read_json(RESULTS_DIR / "annotation_audit.json")
cards = read_json(RESULTS_DIR / "annotation_audit_cards.json")
decisions = read_table("final_annotation_decisions_applied.csv")
comparison = read_table("annotation_method_comparison.csv")
umap_candidates = read_table("umap_candidates.csv")

run = payload.get("run", {})
method = payload.get("method", {})
artifacts = payload.get("artifacts", {})
warnings = run.get("warnings", []) or []
selected_umap_key = method.get("parameters", {}).get("selected_umap_key", "")
selected_umap_reason = method.get("parameters", {}).get("selected_umap_reason", "")

total_clusters = len(decisions)
reviewed = int((decisions.get("review_status", pd.Series(dtype=str)).fillna("") == "reviewed").sum()) if not decisions.empty else 0
labels = int(decisions.get("final_label", pd.Series(dtype=str)).fillna("").astype(str).str.len().gt(0).sum()) if not decisions.empty else 0
agreement_counts = decisions.get("agreement_level", pd.Series(dtype=str)).fillna("unknown").value_counts().to_dict() if not decisions.empty else {}
state_tone = "good" if run.get("state") == "completed" else "warn"
```

<style>
body {
  color: #1f2937;
}
.audit-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(180px, 1fr));
  gap: .75rem;
  margin: 1rem 0 1.25rem;
}
.metric {
  border: 1px solid #d9e2ec;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: .8rem .9rem;
  background: #fbfcfe;
}
.metric strong {
  display: block;
  font-size: 1.55rem;
  line-height: 1.15;
}
.metric span, .muted {
  color: #64748b;
}
.pill {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  border-radius: 999px;
  padding: .18rem .55rem;
  font-size: .78rem;
  font-weight: 650;
  border: 1px solid #cbd5e1;
  color: #334155;
  background: #f8fafc;
  margin: .1rem .15rem .1rem 0;
}
.pill.good {
  color: #166534;
  background: #ecfdf3;
  border-color: #bbf7d0;
}
.pill.warn {
  color: #92400e;
  background: #fff7ed;
  border-color: #fed7aa;
}
.audit-table {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  font-size: .9rem;
}
.audit-table th {
  background: #f1f5f9;
  color: #334155;
}
.audit-table th, .audit-table td {
  border: 1px solid #d9e2ec;
  padding: .42rem .5rem;
  vertical-align: top;
}
.note {
  border-left: 4px solid #2f6f73;
  padding: .75rem .9rem;
  background: #f3faf9;
  margin: 1rem 0;
}
</style>

## Finalization Summary

```{python}
agreement_html = "".join(pill(f"{key}: {value}") for key, value in agreement_counts.items())
display(HTML(f"""
<div class="audit-grid">
  <div class="metric"><strong>{escape(str(total_clusters))}</strong><span>clusters audited</span></div>
  <div class="metric"><strong>{escape(str(labels))}</strong><span>clusters with final labels</span></div>
  <div class="metric"><strong>{escape(str(reviewed))}</strong><span>clusters marked reviewed</span></div>
  <div class="metric"><strong>{escape(str(len(warnings)))}</strong><span>warnings</span></div>
</div>
<p>{pill(run.get("state", "unknown"), state_tone)} {agreement_html}</p>
"""))
```

## Selected Project UMAP

```{python}
selected = pd.DataFrame()
if not umap_candidates.empty and "key" in umap_candidates.columns:
    selected = umap_candidates[umap_candidates["key"].astype(str) == str(selected_umap_key)]
display(HTML(f"""
<div class="note">
  <strong>{escape(str(selected_umap_key or "No selected UMAP recorded"))}</strong><br>
  {escape(str(selected_umap_reason or "No rationale recorded."))}
</div>
"""))
display(html_table(selected, columns=["key", "source", "n_neighbors", "min_dist", "spread", "explanation"]))
```

## Final UMAP Review

```{python}
def final_umap_frame() -> pd.DataFrame:
    h5ad_path = RESULTS_DIR / "adata.final_annotated.h5ad"
    if ad is None or not h5ad_path.exists():
        return pd.DataFrame()
    adata = ad.read_h5ad(h5ad_path, backed="r")
    key = "X_umap" if "X_umap" in adata.obsm else selected_umap_key
    if not key or key not in adata.obsm:
        return pd.DataFrame()
    coords = adata.obsm[key]
    label_key = "scrna_annotate_audit_final_label"
    sample_key = payload.get("input", {}).get("sample_key") or "sample_id"
    final_labels = adata.obs[label_key].astype(str).to_numpy() if label_key in adata.obs else ["unassigned"] * adata.n_obs
    samples = adata.obs[sample_key].astype(str).to_numpy() if sample_key in adata.obs else ["sample"] * adata.n_obs
    frame = pd.DataFrame(
        {
            "UMAP1": coords[:, 0],
            "UMAP2": coords[:, 1],
            "final_label": final_labels,
            "sample": samples,
        }
    )
    return frame


umap_frame = final_umap_frame()
if px is None:
    display(HTML("<p class='muted'>Plotly is not available, so UMAP figures are not embedded.</p>"))
elif umap_frame.empty:
    display(HTML("<p class='muted'>Final h5ad or selected UMAP coordinates were not available for plotting.</p>"))
else:
    fig_label = px.scatter(
        umap_frame,
        x="UMAP1",
        y="UMAP2",
        color="final_label",
        title="Final labels",
        render_mode="webgl",
        height=620,
    )
    fig_label.update_traces(marker={"size": 4, "opacity": 0.75})
    fig_label.update_layout(legend_title_text="Final label")
    fig_label.show()

    fig_sample = px.scatter(
        umap_frame,
        x="UMAP1",
        y="UMAP2",
        color="final_label",
        facet_col="sample",
        facet_col_wrap=3,
        title="Final labels by sample",
        render_mode="webgl",
        height=max(520, 280 * max(1, int((umap_frame["sample"].nunique() + 2) / 3))),
    )
    fig_sample.update_traces(marker={"size": 4, "opacity": 0.75})
    fig_sample.update_layout(legend_title_text="Final label")
    fig_sample.show()
```

## Final Annotation Decisions

```{python}
display(html_table(
    decisions,
    columns=[
        "cluster_id",
        "final_label",
        "review_status",
        "label_source",
        "chosen_method",
        "agreement_level",
        "notes",
    ],
))
```

## Provider Comparison

```{python}
display(html_table(comparison, limit=250))
```

## Exported Artifacts

```{python}
artifact_rows = [{"artifact": key, "path": value} for key, value in artifacts.items() if not isinstance(value, list)]
table_artifacts = artifacts.get("tables", []) if isinstance(artifacts.get("tables"), list) else []
for table_path in table_artifacts:
    artifact_rows.append({"artifact": "table", "path": table_path})
display(html_table(pd.DataFrame(artifact_rows)))
```

## Warnings

```{python}
if warnings:
    display(HTML("<ul>" + "".join(f"<li>{escape(str(item))}</li>" for item in warnings) + "</ul>"))
else:
    display(HTML("<p>No warnings were recorded.</p>"))
```
